question:
Assume that the product failures from an assembly line are 5%. Suppose that
if a product that is defective, a diagnostic test indicates that it is defective 92%
of the time, and if the product is good, the test indicates that it is good 96% of
the time. Calculate the probability that the test will indicate that the product is
defective?

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
